hero.title: Convertitore Immagini
hero.description: Converti immagini tra PNG, JPEG, WebP e AVIF. Veloce, gratuito e orientato alla privacy.

dropzone.orClick: o fai clic per selezionare i file
dropzone.maxSize: Max 5MB per file - Fino a 10 immagini per caricamento

items.question: Quali formati posso convertire?
items.answer: Puoi convertire in WebP, AVIF, PNG e JPEG e selezionare uno o piu formati di output.

items.question: Questo convertitore e privato?
items.answer: Si. L'elaborazione avviene nel browser e i file non vengono salvati in modo permanente sul server.

items.question: Posso convertire piu immagini insieme?
items.answer: Si. Carica piu immagini e scarica output singoli o un archivio ZIP.

items.question: La qualita viene ridotta?
items.answer: Per i formati con perdita come JPEG, WebP e AVIF, la qualita dipende dal livello impostato. PNG resta senza perdita.

settings.selectionInfo: Each image will be converted to:
settings.selectionDescription: Select one or more target formats. When multiple formats are selected, each image will be converted to all selected formats and downloaded as a ZIP file. WebP offers excellent compression, AVIF provides the best compression, PNG preserves transparency losslessly, and JPEG has universal support.
settings.stripMetadata: Strip metadata (EXIF, ICC) for smaller files
settings.stripMetadataDesc: Removing metadata can reduce file size by 10-20% but removes camera information, color profiles, and location data.

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.p1: Your images are processed entirely in your browser. No files are uploaded to any server.
privacy.p2: All conversion happens locally using JavaScript libraries. Your images never leave your device.
privacy.p3: No analytics on image content; only anonymous aggregate performance counters may be collected for optimization.
privacy.p4: Close the tab any time after processing completes. Your privacy is guaranteed.
privacy.notice: All processing local + server-side transient, no files stored.

howTo.title: How To Convert Images Online
howTo.step1Desc: Drag any standard graphics file (JPG, PNG, WebP) directly into the client processor. The engine immediately decodes the pixel grid securely on your device.
howTo.step2Desc: Select modern rendering standards like AVIF or WebP to drastically cut weight, or stick with solid PNGs for flat colors. Tweak the quality scaler to balance lossy encoding.
howTo.step3Desc: Export your newly mapped assets instantly. Perform bulk cross-conversions and pack all the new extensions down into a neat ZIP archive.
howTo.tipText: Use WebP for modern websites (30% smaller than PNG/JPG). AVIF offers the best compression but limited browser support. PNG for transparency, JPEG for photos.

features.title: Key Features
features.universalDesc: Translate pixels across JPEG, PNG, WebP, and AVIF output barriers instantly.
features.clientDesc: Conversion triggers natively in background threads inside your device.
features.encryptedDesc: No outbound storage APIs. WebAssembly runs conversions with complete privacy.
features.controlDesc: Manually control rendering weight or switch to lossless algorithms precisely.
features.archiveDesc: Batch hundreds of assets into a single ZIP library for rapid local downloading.
features.lighthouseDesc: Deliver Next-Gen image formats directly into your picture tags cleanly.

qualityGuide.title: Quality vs Size Guide
qualityGuide.interactiveDemo: Interactive demo: See how quality affects file size in real-time
